title: Apex Trader Funding: Flash 80% Discount (Limited Time)
description: Unlock the industry's most flexible futures evaluation. Secure up to $300,000 in capital with 80% savings and keep 100% of your first $25k profits.
seo_content:
Apex Trader Funding 80% OFF Deal

Apex Trader Funding is running a time-limited flash sale with an exceptional 80% discount on all futures evaluation accounts. Use code APEX80 at checkout to slash your entry cost and gain access to accounts ranging from $25,000 all the way up to $300,000 in simulated trading capital — a rare opportunity for serious futures traders to get started at a fraction of the usual price.

Apex Trader Funding was founded with a mission to give skilled futures traders access to institutional-grade capital without requiring large personal deposits. The firm has built a reputation for paying out millions of dollars to traders globally and is widely regarded as one of the most trader-friendly prop firms in the futures space, thanks to its transparent rules and flexible evaluation structure.

With code APEX80, you receive 80% off any evaluation account, including the most popular tiers. Once funded, you keep 100% of your first $25,000 in profits, and all subsequent profits are split at a generous 90/10 in your favor. The evaluation itself is a simple one-step process with no daily drawdown rule — only a trailing max drawdown — which gives traders the freedom to manage their sessions without constant risk of an early washout.

Apex Trader Funding operates on a trailing drawdown model rather than a daily loss limit, which removes one of the most stressful constraints in prop trading. Payouts are processed twice monthly, and the firm supports a wide range of futures instruments. There are no minimum trading day requirements during the evaluation, and the account can scale up to $300,000 in total buying power across multiple accounts.

To claim this deal, visit the Apex Trader Funding website via the link above, select your preferred account size, and enter code APEX80 during checkout. The discount applies instantly at the payment screen. This is a flash promotion and availability is limited, so lock in your savings before the offer expires.

youtube_metadata.title: Apex Trader Funding: How to Get 80% OFF!
youtube_metadata.description: Save 80% on your Apex Trader Funding evaluation with code APEX80. The best deal for futures traders in 2026.
